attacking_style: Opportunistic finisher rather than long-range attacker; excels in reduced sprints from small groups after others have been exhausted by earlier attacks. Positioned to capitalize within final 200m.
team_tactics: Uses team to drive pace for splits and tactical advantage; willing to work aggressively even in yellow jersey to isolate rivals. Relies on positioning rather than domestique leadouts.
terrain_preference: Hilly classics terrain with selective but not excessively steep climbs; thrives when race is hard enough to reduce group but not mountainous. Exposed on sustained climbing beyond 45km from finish.
vulnerability: Cracks on sustained climbs even of modest gradient when positioned poorly; struggles when high-tempo teams (notably Jumbo-Visma) accelerate without established position. GC form appears fragile over stage races.
key_patterns: Superior positioning skills evident: Teunissen wheel at 150m, winning from reduced groups (2 observations)
Vulnerable to poor positioning under team accelerations, loses significant time in second/third groups (2 observations)
Cracks on climbs 45km+ from finish under sustained pressure, limiting GC viability (2 observations)
Tactical maturity: drives pace in leader jersey for team benefit, not just defensive (2 observations)
Benefits when rivals exhaust themselves with long attacks he can follow (Paris-Nice 2020 win pattern)
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 Paris-Nice showed clear decline—lost defending champion status through poor positioning and cracking on moderate climbs, dropping from yellow to off-podium
